headline: Datadog, Inc. (DDOG) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
summary: Datadog (DDOG) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headline: Assessing Datadog (DDOG) Valuation After A 64% One Month Share Price Surge
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Datadog (DDOG) has drawn attention after a strong recent run, with the stock up about 64% over the past month and about 76% over the past 3 months. This has prompted closer scrutiny of its fundamentals. The company operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications, with products that span infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, incident response, cloud cost management, and multiple security...

headline: 1 Software Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Find Risky
summary: From commerce to culture, software is digitizing every aspect of our lives. This secular theme makes SaaS companies attractive investment candidates but also comes with higher valuations that cause volatility. Unfortunately, the rich prices have haunted them over the past six months as the industry has shed 9.2%. This performance is a noticeable divergence from the S&P 500’s 11.6% return.
